# Elvenwood Interiors

> Factory-direct modular kitchens, wardrobes, and complete home interiors in Bangalore. 17,400 sq ft CNC factory in Bommasandra Industrial Area. Italian Biesse CNC machines, Century Ply BWP plywood, Hettich/Blum hardware. 45-day delivery, 10-year warranty. Rated 4.9/5 on Google (127+ reviews).

## Company Facts
- Factory: 17,400 sq ft in Bommasandra Industrial Area, Bangalore
- Equipment: Italian Biesse CNC machines (0.1mm precision)
- Materials: Century Ply BWP plywood, Greenlam/Merino laminates, Hettich & Blum soft-close hardware
- Delivery: 28-45 days from design approval
- Warranty: 10-year on all modular furniture
- Contact: +91 7483226449 (WhatsApp & Phone)
- Email: info@elvenwood.in
- Hours: Monday-Saturday, 9 AM - 9 PM
- Location: Experience Centre, Bommasandra Industrial Area, Bangalore 560099
- Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/wQ54EVWc7VLsgLZs9
- Google Rating: 4.9/5 (127+ reviews)

## Pricing Overview
- Modular Kitchen (Straight): from Rs 1.08 Lakh
- Modular Kitchen (L-Shaped): from Rs 1.96 Lakh
- Modular Kitchen (U-Shaped): from Rs 2.55 Lakh
- Wardrobe (Laminate): from Rs 784/sq ft
- 1BHK Complete Interior: from Rs 2.35 Lakh
- 2BHK Complete Interior: from Rs 3.33 Lakh
- 3BHK Complete Interior: from Rs 4.70 Lakh
- 4BHK Complete Interior: from Rs 7.35 Lakh

## Package Tiers
- Essential (Rs 1,176/sq ft): BWP plywood, laminate finish, Hettich hardware
- Classic (Rs 1,764/sq ft): Premium laminates, profile handles, soft-close everything
- Premium (Rs 2,940/sq ft): Acrylic/lacquer finish, Blum hardware, glass elements

- [Home](https://elvenwood.in/): Overview, pricing, testimonials

- [Experience Centre](https://elvenwood.in/experience-centre): Visit info, factory tour, location

- [Electronic City](https://elvenwood.in/interior-designers-electronic-city): 10 min from factory

- [Sarjapur Road](https://elvenwood.in/interior-designers-sarjapur-road): 15 min from factory
- [Anekal](https://elvenwood.in/interior-designers-anekal): 5 min from factory
- [Anantnagar](https://elvenwood.in/interior-designers-anantnagar): 8 min from factory

## Apartment-Specific Pages
- [Brigade Valencia](https://elvenwood.in/interiors-brigade-valencia): 2BHK, 2.5BHK & 3BHK interiors
- [Mahendra Aarya](https://elvenwood.in/interiors-mahendra-aarya): 662 units, Electronic City Phase 2
- [Abode 99](https://elvenwood.in/interiors-abode-99): 2BHK & 3BHK interiors near Anantnagar

## Services Offered
- Modular Kitchens (Straight, L-Shape, U-Shape, Parallel, Island)
- Custom Wardrobes (Hinged, Sliding, Walk-in)
- TV Units & Entertainment Walls
- Study Tables & Bookshelves
- Shoe Racks & Foyer Storage
- Crockery Units & Pooja Rooms
- Complete Home Interiors (all rooms as one project)
- False Ceiling, Painting, Electrical, Plumbing
